## Category

Select the most appropriate category:

- [ ] Smart Contracts
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Indexing
- [ ] Wallets
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Storage
- [ ] DeFi
- [ ] NFTs
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## Description

**One-sentence description (shown on the card):**
<!-- Max 160 characters. What it does and who it's for. -->

**Extended description (shown on the detail page):**
<!-- 2–4 sentences. The key value prop, who made it, and what problem it solves. -->

---

## Tags

<!-- 3–6 lowercase tags, comma-separated. Example: solidity, testing, cli -->

---

## Why should this be in StackHub?

<!-- Is it widely used? Actively maintained? Fills a gap in the catalog? -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] The tool is relevant to Web3 / on-chain development
- [ ] The GitHub repository is public and actively maintained (last commit within 12 months)
- [ ] I have read the [contributing guide](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I am not affiliated with this tool (or I have disclosed that I am)
